houseOverlays.description: Partner A's Sun in Partner B's 8th House: An intense and transformative connection. Partner A triggers deep changes in Partner B's psyche. Issues of shared resources, intimacy, and secrets come to the forefront. Highly magnetic.
Partner A's Moon in Partner B's 9th House: Shared emotional philosophy. Travel and learning bring you closer emotionally.
Partner A's Mars in Partner B's 9th House: Adventure buddies. You challenge each other's beliefs. Active travel or learning.
Partner A's Mercury in Partner B's 8th House: Deep, probing conversations. You share secrets and explore depths.
Partner A's Jupiter in Partner B's 10th House: Professional success. Partner A boosts Partner B's reputation.
Partner A's Venus in Partner B's 8th House: A deep, intense, and possibly obsessive attraction. Sexual chemistry is profound and transformative. Finances may be merged.
Partner A's Saturn in Partner B's 1st House: A serious, karmic bond. Partner A has a sobering effect on Partner B. Indicates responsibility and maturity, but can feel restrictive.
Partner A's Rahu in Partner B's 9th House: Obsession with non-traditional beliefs or travel.
Partner A's Ketu in Partner B's 3rd House: Quiet or intuitive communication.

Partner B's Sun in Partner A's 9th House: Partner B expands Partner A's horizons. This relationship involves travel, philosophy, and higher learning. Partner B inspires Partner A to grow and see the bigger picture.
Partner B's Moon in Partner A's 7th House: Partner A sees Partner B as 'family-like' and emotionally supportive. Partner B wants to care for Partner A. Great for long-term domestic life.
Partner B's Mars in Partner A's 9th House: Adventure buddies. You challenge each other's beliefs. Active travel or learning.
Partner B's Mercury in Partner A's 9th House: Intellectual expansion. Travel and philosophy are shared topics.
Partner B's Jupiter in Partner A's 9th House: Shared philosophy and travel. Partner B is a teacher/mentor figure to Partner A. Spiritual growth is key.
Partner B's Venus in Partner A's 7th House: A strong indicator of love and marriage. Partner B embodies what Partner A desires in a partner. Harmony and balance are natural.
Partner B's Saturn in Partner A's 10th House: Power couple potential. You build a legacy. Partner B stabilizes Partner A's career.
Partner B's Rahu in Partner A's 3rd House: Intense communication or shared mental goals.
Partner B's Ketu in Partner A's 9th House: Shared spiritual philosophy and non-attachment.

darakarakaContact.description: Darakaraka Kendra (1/4/7/10): This is a dynamic and industrious soul connection. You challenge each other to become the highest versions of yourselves, building a solid and active life together.

conflictZone.awarenessNote: HARMONIOUS FLOW: Few significant conflict zones detected. Relationship naturally tends toward conflict resolution.

patterns.name: Complex Romantic History
patterns.description: The 5th house is heavily active with 3 planets. This typically indicates a life where romantic experiences have been a major avenue for self-discovery. You likely have a history of falling in love deeply and often, with each relationship shaping your identity significantly.
patterns.advice: Ensure your current partner understands that your past was a "training ground," not a comparison chart.

counterBalance.title: Specific Counter: Ishta Devata Protection
counterBalance.text: Benefics/Moksha planets (Moon) in 12th from Karakamsa indicate a spiritual path that prioritizes liberation over worldly indulgence

patterns.name: Unconventional Romantic Desires
patterns.description: Rahu in the 5th house creates intense, unconventional, and sometimes obsessive romantic attraction. May be drawn to unusual or taboo romantic situations.
patterns.advice: Self-awareness about obsessive tendencies in romance helps channel this energy constructively.

counterBalance.title: General Stabilizer: KP Dharmic Alignment
counterBalance.text: 7th Cusp Sub-Lord connects to the 9th House of Dharma, indicating that righteousness is a core value in relationships.

patterns.name: Financial/Business Partnership Trigger
patterns.description: The direct connection between wealth sectors (2nd/11th) and relationships suggests that shared financial goals or business dealings are a primary avenue for emotional entanglement. You may confuse financial compatibility or business synergy with romantic destiny. ( + 7th Lord in 2nd/11th of D2 (Hora))
patterns.advice: Keep business and personal accounts/interactions rigidly separate. Do not mix romance with investment discussions.

counterBalance.title: General Stabilizer: KP Dharmic Alignment
counterBalance.text: 7th Cusp Sub-Lord connects to the 9th House of Dharma, indicating that righteousness is a core value in relationships.

patterns.name: Family/Taboo Connection Pattern
patterns.description: Planetary afflictions involving the 4th/9th houses (D1/D12) suggest a complex psychological pattern where "forbidden" or "taboo" dynamics trigger attraction. This indicates a high-risk pattern suggesting potential for boundary-crossing within close family circles or extended domestic networks. ( + 7th Lord in 4th/9th of D12 (Dwadasamsa))
patterns.advice: Strict adherence to social and familial boundaries is essential. Seek professional guidance if you notice patterns of attraction to inappropriate or unavailable figures.

counterBalance.title: Specific Counter: KP Dharmic Alignment
counterBalance.text: 7th Cusp Sub-Lord connects to the 9th House of Dharma, indicating that righteousness is a core value in relationships.

patterns.name: Spiritual/Mentorship Connection
patterns.description: A link between the 7th and 9th houses often creates an attraction to mentors, gurus, or figures of authority in spiritual settings. The danger here is idealizing a guide or teacher and confusing spiritual intimacy with romantic love. ( + 7th Lord in 9th/5th of D20 (Spiritual Chart))
patterns.advice: Distinguish clearly between spiritual devotion and personal intimacy. Avoid one-on-one private sessions with mentors.

counterBalance.title: General Stabilizer: Atmakaraka Nobility
counterBalance.text: The Soul Significator (Venus) is a natural benefic, indicating a soul that naturally rejects deceit

patterns.name: Financial/Business Partnership Trigger
patterns.description: The direct connection between wealth sectors (2nd/11th) and relationships suggests that shared financial goals or business dealings are a primary avenue for emotional entanglement. You may confuse financial compatibility or business synergy with romantic destiny. ( + 7th Lord in 2nd/11th of D2 (Hora))
patterns.advice: Keep business and personal accounts/interactions rigidly separate. Do not mix romance with investment discussions.

doshas.name: Nadi Analysis

doshas.effects: Same nadi can indicate health incompatibility and genetic concerns for offspring
remedies: Donate gold or grains on auspicious days
